declared.title: Ethiopia: Freedom on the Net 2023 Country Report
declared.selection_rationale: URL pattern-verified, not individually fetched this pass (see note above). Coverage-contribution value: a second Ethiopia data point alongside the existing 2024 chapter -- particularly relevant given Ethiopia is this corpus's lowest-scored/"Not Free" country in the 2024 edition, so an earlier year's chapter may capture how conflict-related connectivity disruption evolved rather than a single snapshot. Confirm actual content during semantic review before marking Included.
